triage_rows.direction: use the preview lane to inspect candidate top theme and symbol before any consumer promotion
treat a would_change opportunity result as an intentional focus rotation event rather than a silent merge side effect
treat a would_change top-watch result as a symbol watch rotation that requires explicit downstream acceptance

interpretation: The second-source candidate lane is now measurable in downstream consumer terms rather than only source terms.
This keeps candidate promotion empirical, explicit, and reversible.
